the ability that sellers of digital ownable media such as movie, music and video games, are able to remove this content from the consumers library. the result is that the buyer of the content no longer has acces to the media that they purchased.

paragraphs.text: Regarding point 2 the main thing that comes to mind would be short-form video content as seen on Tiktok, Youtube and instagram. This type of content is deliberatly designed to be as addictive as possible by the platform and its creators. Rarely is the content in these videos of any value do nothing but scroll. It is quite a widespread problem that it has gotten a slangterm being "Doomscrolling". This is the act of endlessly scrolling these videos that it becames physically and especially mentally draining. Additionally, A point should be made on the ability that sellers of digital ownable media such as movie, music and video games, are able to remove this content from the consumers library. the result is that the buyer of the content no longer has acces to the media that they purchased. unfortunatly the companies are able to do this without any repercussion. Thank you for your time!
